top_signals.title: Uefa warns Kang and London City Lionesses over multi-club rules
top_signals.summary: Uefa has warned Michele Kang and other investors that women’s football will not be granted an exception to its rules on multi-club ownership. It means US billionaire Kang may have to sell or place into a blind trust either French side OL Lyonnes or London City Lionesses if they both qualify for European competition in [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Senator presses CISA for answers about alleged GitHub repository leak
top_signals.summary: U.S. Senator Maggie Hassan (D-NH) sent a letter to the acting director of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday demanding answers about an alleged breach uncovered by cybersecurity reporter Brian Krebs involving government contractor Nightwing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: More car buyers are shifting to EVs — but the reasons why are nuanced
top_signals.summary: Trade in data from Edmunds shows more car buyers are choosing EVs, as fuel prices spike. But other factors might be holding back demand.
